notes: Only symbols imported or improved by V12.6 are selected by default.
Existing seed dates are preserved and never overwritten.
New rows are accepted only after exact symbol, EGX market evidence, acceptable currency, and seed-close overlap continuity checks.
Yahoo gap completion is the same source family as the historical seed and is not independent cross-verification.
Confidence remains capped at 70 for gap rows until an independent source verifies them.
